name: Test — Anthropic hookify plugin
description: Exercises all four lifecycle hooks registered by the official anthropics/hookify plugin: UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop. The agent reads a file, writes a summary, and stops — hooks fire at every phase and progress events are visible in run telemetry.

document.name: test-plugin-hookify
document.title: Test plugin: hookify
document.summary: Run a short read/write task so hookify's four hooks fire end-to-end.

input.promptPlaceholder: Ask the agent to describe or summarize something — any task that uses tools.

with.stopCondition: Stop after you have run `echo hi > note.txt`, read the file back, and summarized it in the final response.
